Patient Details | Cancer Target Dates || Hospital Number: 9990001(d)
NHS Number: 9990000001(c)
AIDEN O'CONNOR(b)
Male(e)
26/05/1970(a) Age: 55 | 62 DAY TARGET: 20/05/2025

Please note: If the 62 Day Breach Date is blank, the patient is on a 31 Day Pathway. Please ensure that the Decision To Treat Date is within 31 days of the Treatment Date. || Staging & Diagnosis(g) || Diagnosis: ADENOCARCINOMA, NOT OTHERWISE SPECIFIED 
ICD10 Code: 10 - C20: Malignant neoplasm of rectum - rectal ampulla 
Differentiation:  Moderately differentiated | Staging:    
Integrated TNM Stage:      
Dukes: || Clinical Details(f): || TWR / DTT

Colonoscopy : At 13cm from insertion there was a malignant looking mass with an abnormal pit pattern suspicious features for malignancy. 

Discuss imaging, staging and path || MDT Outcome(h) || DTT

CT 29/02/2025: Mid rectal caner with associated mesorectal lymph nodes. Multiple nodules within the lungs suspicious for lung metastases. Indeterminate retroperitoneal lymph nodes. 
Colonoscopy noted - Histo: Adenocarcinoma. MMR deficient 

Outcome: MRI Rectum, PET CT. Rediscuss at MDT for formal staging. Patient aware, decision RE treatment following further imaging and discussion.

Patient Details | Cancer Target Dates || Hospital Number: 9990002(d)
NHS Number: 9990000002(c)
ZIAD AL-FARSI(b)
Male(e)
30/03/1944 Age: 81 Years(a) | 62 DAY TARGET: 

Please note: If the 62 Day Breach Date is blank, the patient is on a 31 Day Pathway. Please ensure that the Decision To Treat Date is within 31 days of the Treatment Date. || Staging & Diagnosis(g) || Diagnosis: ADENOCARCINOMA, NOT OTHERWISE SPECIFIED 
ICD10 Code: 10 - C20: Malignant neoplasm of rectum - rectal ampulla 
Differentiation:  Poorly differentiated | Staging: T3 N0 M0 
Integrated TNM Stage:      
Dukes: || Clinical Details(f): || Known prior lymphoma, treated 
Now fresh PR bleeding 
Weight loss
Referral from haematology MDT with PET-CT avidity in rectum. 

CT 22/2/2025: no lymphadenopathy. New semi-annular thickening in rectum 
PET-CT 1/3/25: no nodal avidity, avidity in the mid rectum- recommend direct visualisation. 

Haematology-oncology MDT 3/3/25: for discussion in the lower GI MDT 

Lower-GI MDT 5/3/35 – for colonoscopy || MDT Outcome(h) || Colonoscopy: polypoidal lesion in the low rectum, biopsy adenocarcinoma, poorly differentiated. 

MRI 4/3/25 – low rectal lesion with a low signal stalk, area of ulceration noted. Some high signal change consistent with mucus. Soft tissue extends to ISP so low rectal cancer plane is unsafe. T3c, N1c, CRM/ISP unsafe, EMVI positive, PSW clear

Patient Details | Cancer Target Dates || Hospital Number: 9990003
NHS Number: 9990000003
AISHA MOHAMMED
Female
19/12/1974 Age: 51 Years | 62 DAY TARGET: 28/05/2025

Please note: If the 62 Day Breach Date is blank, the patient is on a 31 Day Pathway. Please ensure that the Decision To Treat Date is within 31 days of the Treatment Date. || Staging & Diagnosis(g) || Diagnosis:  
ICD10 Code:  
Differentiation: | Staging:    
Integrated TNM Stage:      
Dukes: || Clinical Details(f): || BCSP : wants further treatment locally. 

Multiple polyps within the colon, largest is 3 cm in the descending colon – 2 cm polyp located at the ICV and multiple diminutive polyps seen elsewhere. Biopsies taken. 

To discuss histology, CT and plan || MDT Outcome(h) || Descending colon polyp – well differentiated adenocarcinoma 
Other polyps – tubular adenoma with low grade dysplasia 

CT TAP: fullness in the descending colon with no evidence of extramural spread. No lymphadenopathy. No metastases. 

Outcome
To see consultant next week to discuss possible surgery 
Repeat colonoscopy with tattoo

Patient Details | Cancer Target Dates || Hospital Number: 9990004
NHS Number: 9990000004
MATTEO ROSSI
Male
25/02/1943 Age: 82 Years | 62 DAY TARGET: 06/05/2025

Please note: If the 62 Day Breach Date is blank, the patient is on a 31 Day Pathway. Please ensure that the Decision To Treat Date is within 31 days of the Treatment Date. || Staging & Diagnosis(g) || Diagnosis: ADENOCARCINOMA, NOT OTHERWISE SPECIFIED 
ICD10 Code: 10 - C20: Malignant neoplasm of rectum - rectal ampulla 
Differentiation:  Moderately differentiated | Staging: T3 N0 M0 
Integrated TNM Stage: I     
Dukes: || Clinical Details(f): || Feb 2025 – adenocarcinoma of low rectum with deficient MMR 
MRI stage: T2 N0 EMVI negative ISP involved CRM clear PSW clear 
CRT to downstage 

6 week MRI – staging unchanged but of low signal and may represent complete response

Plan: for 10 week MRI and fleci sig || MDT Outcome(h) || MRI 1/3/25: Persistent low signal, may represent complete response 
Flexi sig: scar seen

Outcome: to see surgeon, for discussion with patient RE entering watch and wait
